title: cryptool.io is live - feedback wanted
content_html:
The new cryptool.io is live.

This is a foundation, not a finished product. The team is actively collecting feedback from the community, and the next iteration of the site will be shaped directly by what users say. If something feels unclear, if a section is missing, if a sentence could land harder, send it through.

The platform modules behind the site are next.
author: Cryptool
